_comment: Landing page CTA A/B test: 'Sign Up' vs 'Start Free Trial'. Tests analyze mode with a statistically significant result and sample-size planning for the next test.
test_name: Homepage CTA — Sign Up vs Start Free Trial
hypothesis: Changing the CTA from 'Sign Up' to 'Start Free Trial' will increase signup conversion rate by 30% because it communicates lower commitment and immediate value.
